name: Discovery_Questions
rows: Which capabilities does the client need? (SSO / MFA / Adaptive Access / Lifecycle Mgmt & Governance / Analytics)
Average logins per user per year? (decimals OK)
If Lifecycle Mgmt & Governance or Analytics: how many managed users?
Any add-ons? (SMS/Email MFA, App Gateway, Vanity Domain, Non-Prod)
Current authoritative DNS provider? (self-hosted / registrar / cloud / premium)
Average monthly DNS query volume (MQ)? Estimate OK.
Need traffic steering / GSLB? How many records need steering? RUM-based?
Need up/down monitoring? How many hostnames/IPs?
Resilience needs — secondary or Dedicated DNS? (PoPs min 3, max 12)
Operations in mainland China? (min 50M China MQ; requires Managed DNS)
Observability needs? (DNS Insights: 20% of queries, to 10%)
Expected growth? (size queries with headroom to avoid overages)
New/expanding customer (Platform RU model) or stable renewal (Clients model)?
Picks Model A or B — cannot mix
Model A: which use cases & volumes (static/dynamic/PKI/SSH/transit/KMSE)? Model B: how many Clients?
Production edition? (Essentials/Standard/Premium — Premium for DR/perf replication)
Add-ons: PKI certificates? KMIP / ADP (Key Mgmt, Transform)? Custom plugins?
Advanced Support? (large customers only, +15% via Z part)
